workflow_types.label: Knowledge-first frontend generation
workflow_types.description: Agent retrieves local UI/design knowledge before generating frontend code.

workflow_types.label: API-first retrieval
workflow_types.description: Agent uses local HTTP API instead of filesystem paths or direct SQLite access.

workflow_types.label: Windows tool/path handling
workflow_types.description: Rules for PowerShell, Bash path conversion, and local command execution.

workflow_types.label: Handoff report
workflow_types.description: Required final report shape for agents using this knowledge base.

workflow_types.label: Failure recovery
workflow_types.description: How agents recover from missing API, path errors, empty search, or low-relevance chunks.

workflow_types.label: Quality gate
workflow_types.description: Verification and acceptance criteria before claiming completion.
